message:
test(fwc): expand checkpoint, session, and validate test suites

checkpoint: 60 → 119 tests (+59) — clone/debug/eq traits, parse_replay_mode
edge cases, CheckpointStore path helpers, serialization with Unicode and
special chars, store lifecycle operations, ResolvedReplay Display variants.

session: 60 → 125 tests (+65) — SessionId parsing/generation/display,
SessionStatus as_str/parse/serde, Session state transitions and context
mutations, SessionStore save/load/list/active, resolve_session_id edge
cases, serde serialization variants.

validate: 64 → 138 tests (+74) — type_fix_suggestion all branches,
type_matches exhaustive coverage, root-level validation for all types,
array constraints, combined min+max constraints, deep nesting, enum edge
cases, boundary values, ValidationError API, schema edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
